metadata.methodology: Statistical Command Analysis with Brutal Honesty

sample_commands.name: ultrathink.md
sample_commands.savage_verdict: This command is the Swiss Army chainsaw of thinking tools - it does everything but asks if you really need it to do everything. 357 lines for what could be 50. That's not intelligence, that's intellectual obesity.

sample_commands.name: adaptive-complexity-router.md
sample_commands.savage_verdict: 499 lines to route complexity? The irony is thicker than a PhD thesis. This is complexity routing FOR complexity routing. It's meta-complexity all the way down, turtle boy.

sample_commands.name: java-rapid-implementation.md
sample_commands.savage_verdict: Finally, someone who remembers what 'rapid' means. 250 lines with actual restraint. Still has some unnecessary XML meditation, but at least it won't make your brain bleed.
